features.evidence: I was looking for a 1080p 16gbRAM laptop, and this laptop exceeded my expectations, especially with the Black Friday deal!Good battery life, really fast, great features all around, I would recommend this laptop for casual/mid range productive work (photo editing, coding, board development…) Both charge to to 100%, but if I store them for a week or so, the battery is completely dead in each one and will not boot without being plugged in; that is, the keyboard lights will not even turn on when I press the power button
value: average battery life in hours: 9.5 Hours

features.evidence: Functions well, the only issue I can convey is that the fans WILL make a considerable amount of noise Laptop sounds like it’s ready to explode the fan on this sounds like an airplane getting ready to take off it’s constant
Speed is good! Very easy to set up!

Both charge to to 100%, but if I store them for a week or so, the battery is completely dead in each one and will not boot without being plugged in; that is, the keyboard lights will not even turn on when I press the power button
This laptop is the best value for money you could get

I was looking for a 1080p 16gbRAM laptop, and this laptop exceeded my expectations, especially with the Black Friday deal!Good battery life, really fast, great features all around, I would recommend this laptop for casual/mid range productive work (photo editing, coding, board development…)
I suggest finding a laptop cooling stand to help ensure no overheating occurs from having the laptop lie flat on a surface
